items.statcast_observation: Michael Massey produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 104.0 mph at a 11.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the Cincinnati Reds, KC 5, CIN 2. Stephen Kolek led the night, working 7.0 innings with 2 earned runs, 8 strikeouts and 2 walks. Michael Massey supplied the loudest Royals contact at 104.0 mph.
items.title: Royals at Reds Recap
